scenarioName: Mark QA passed and promoted from the filesystem body

steps.action: Live Gemini reviewed Mark QA passed and promoted from the filesystem body
steps.targetSurface: Markdown report review and CLI evidence review
steps.expectedResult: A status sentinel file named 'docs/features/_STATUS.qa-passed.promoted.<feature-id>.md' should be created. This sentinel should contain JSON setting 'end-user QA status' to 'QA passed' and 'promotion status' to 'promoted'. Additionally, the sentinel should link to the immutable promoted QA bundle and the promotion decision artifact.
steps.observedResult: No execution results were observed as the 'report.md' and Gemini live-call receipt were not provided as evidence surfaces.
